The building is recognized for its Mid-Century Modern style and has won an Honor Award from the National American Institute of Architests (AIA).

title: Pasadena Heritage House Headquarters
scope: Seismic retrofit of brick foundation

title: Monrovia Residence
scope: Complete interior update for Spanish revival residence in deferred maintenance: replace and refinish ceiling, crown moulding, and drywall. Recreate character-defining architectural details including interior arches and plaster fireplace. Kitchen upgrade and gut renovation of two bathrooms. Refinish original 1920s hardwood floors. Salvage and repair original 1920s double hung sash windows. Update knob and tube electrical throughout. Brace and bolt foundation in basement to current California seismic code. Construction of Spanish tile portico over exterior doors.

title: Arcadia ADU
scope: Complete construction of 1,000 square foot freestanding accessory dwelling unit (ADU) on private property—from framing to finishing, including hardscape and pool

title: Hindry House
scope: Two phases of repair to wood beams on second floor deck at historic California Craftsman style house by master architects Arthur and Alfred Heineman

title: Will Rogers Historic State Park

facts.label: Owner
facts.value: State of California Department of Parks & Recreation

scope: Fire restoration to reinforce three remaining main house chimneys following 2025 Palisades Fire. Provide immediate response to preserve remaining Visitor Center rafters and wood shake roofing. Remediate and protect remaining portion of fire-damaged historic blacksmith shop.

title: Westridge School
scope: Custom construction of Westridge School for Girls' donor bench, utilizing poured and molded concrete, western red cedar, mortise and tenon construction, custom CNC patina metal with etched-glass inserts (by Judson Studios), with an etched 70lb bronze plaque. The bench enhances the historic presence in front of the 1906 Robert Pitcairn Jr. house.
